prompt: 我在做一个小红书笔记生成工具，Python写的，用来帮用户自动生成小红书风格的文案。项目已经进行了一个多月了，代码有了，但是我每次跟AI协作都要重新解释一遍背景，特别烦。帮我建立一套AI协作文档系统吧。已经确定的技术决策：用OpenAI API，不用其他模型；输出格式固定是Markdown；不做UI，只做命令行工具。

assertions.name: Documents generated in Chinese
assertions.text: All generated documents are primarily in Chinese

assertions.name: Three existing decisions pre-populated
assertions.text: DECISIONS.md includes entries for OpenAI API only, Markdown output, and CLI only

assertions.name: HANDOFF.md reflects project context
assertions.text: HANDOFF.md mentions 小红书 or content generation context

assertions.name: No placeholders remain
assertions.text: None of the generated files contain {placeholder} or similar unfilled template tokens
